name: 7-up Lemon Cheesecake with Strawberry Glaze
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Combine graham cracker crumbs, powdered sugar, and cinnamon in a bowl.
2. Add melted butter and mix well.
3. Press the mixture onto the bottom and partway up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
4. Chill.
Filling:
1. Soften gelatin in 1/4 cup (4 minutes) of cold 7-Up.
2. In a saucepan, combine pie filling, sugar, beaten eggs, and water.
3. Blend well.
4. Add 1-1/4 cups (6 tbsp) of the hot 7-Up to the mixture and bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in softened gelatin for 3 minutes.
6. Stir in half of the warm mixture into the softened cream cheese until well combined.
7. Mix with the remaining 7-Up mixture until well blended.
8. Turn into chilled crust and chill for at least 8 hours.
Topping:
1. Brush top of chilled cheesecake with melted strawberry jelly.
2. Arrange fresh strawberries on top and spoon any remaining jelly over them.
